conditional-style-runtime.init_order_note: widgetRuntimeController is late-bound because applyStyleRulesForWidget is supplied while the controller is being constructed; the callback is only invoked later during render.

widget-content-runtime.before: app/static/app.js delegate closures for widget runtime content
widget-content-runtime.live_entrypoint: app.js callers use renderWidgetRuntimeContent, setWidgetRuntimeContent, widgetInstanceFromElement returned by the module
widget-content-runtime.init_order_note: created immediately after widgetRuntimeController is constructed, preserving the prior closure timing.
